since_last: 42% of 100 AI names green; AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads +0.67%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 42% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.88% · BTC +0.34% · Gold +0.74% · Nasdaq100 -1.19%. 42% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure is doing the heavy lifting at +0.67%.

cards.headline: AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at +0.67%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -2.43%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: ISRG is the standout at -12.95%
cards.body: Leaders: LEU +6.39%, SKHY +4.63%, CSCO +2.95%, ZS +2.62%, HPE +2.61%. Laggards: ISRG -12.95%, PUBM -5.50%, AMAT -4.95%, SPCX -4.36%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -4.36% at $125.4
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -4.36% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
